name: Sign Message Demo
description: Sign an arbitrary message using the connected Safe wallet.

name: ERC20 Transfer Demo
description: Send an ERC20 token transfer via the connected Safe wallet.

name: XMTP Circles Demo
description: Enables XMTP messaging for Safe wallets with native Circles support, allowing users to coordinate and message directly within a secure chat.

name: Coinflip Game
description: A simple coin flip mini app game.

name: MiniApps Org Manager
description: Builder-focused setup tool for miniapp organizations, including org creation, accepted CRC configuration, signer management, and withdrawals.

name: CRC Quest Board
description: Community bounty marketplace where users post tasks with CRC rewards and others complete them for payment. Build a gig economy on Circles personal currencies.

name: CRC Social Vouchers
description: Create gift vouchers redeemable for CRC. Generate shareable links with QR codes for gifting Circles to friends and community members.

name: Social Attestation
description: Create self-signed attestations for your social accounts and add them to your Circles profile.

name: Backer Voting
description: Governance voting for Circles backers and indirect backers. Vote on proposals and shape the future of the network.

name: Test Account Flagger
description: Flag your Circles account as a test or bot account. Flagged accounts are excluded from analytics dashboards and TMS group additions.
